description: A food processor has a product recall and needs to trace a batch of spinach back to the field it was harvested from.

nodes.task_description: Receive the lot number from the recalled product.
Query the traceability system using the lot number to find the corresponding harvest date and field ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the spinach was harvested on July 10th from Field 7B.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all application and harvest records for that field for the specified date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a complete history for the specific batch of spinach, confirming no off-label chemicals were used.
